4 0000000000 a

Starting at I 7 increasing
I 0 0010010011 partial 0010010011 4

left 8
Starting at AND 02 decreasing
AND 71 0010000000 partial 0010000000 1

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 I 7
4 C 4n

6 AND 02
7 AND 13

Applying to 00000111
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 I 5 = 1
2 I 6 = 1
3 I 7 = 1
4 C 4n = NOT(0) = 1
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 AND 02 = AND(I 0,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
7 AND 13 = AND(I 1,I 3) = AND(0,0) = 0

\boxed{01111000}
